blended.narrative: Sunshine Village is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,391 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.3" of snow, highs of 12°F. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
